zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Cutler II於1558年1月18日出生在英國素福爾可易普斯維其時，他的父親Robert Cutler I34歲，母親Parnell Barker28歲。他於1575年1月13日與Alice Gardner在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1619年7月8日在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯普盧頓享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Cutler II于1558年1月18日出生在英国素福爾可易普斯維其时，他的父亲Robert Cutler I34岁，母亲Parnell Barker28岁。他于1575年1月13日与Alice Gardner在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1619年7月8日在英国英格兰素福爾可斯普盧頓享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: Cutler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of knives, from Middle English cutele, cutteler, coteler ‘cutler; maker, repairer, or seller of knives, etc.’ (Anglo-French cuteler, Old French coutelier, cotelier). Compare Nesmith and Cottle .
Americanized form of German Kottler or Kattler, which is of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Nesmith
meanings: English and Scottish (Glasgow): occupational name for a maker of knives, from Middle English knif-smith ‘knife-smith, cutler’ (Old English cnīf + smith).
English: alternatively, an occupational name connected with wheel making, from Middle English nave-smith ‘nave-smith’ (Old English nafu, nafa ‘nave, the central part of a wheel’ + smith).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Cutler II was born on 18 January 1558, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Cutler I, was 34 and his mother, Parnell Barker, was 28. He married Alice Gardner on 13 January 1575, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 8 July 1619, in Sproughton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Cutler II est né le 18 janvier 1558, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Cutler I, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Parnell Barker, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Alice Gardner le 13 janvier 1575, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1619, à Sproughton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Cutler II am 18. Januar 1558 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Cutler I 34 und seine Mutter Parnell Barker 28. Er hat am 13. Januar 1575 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England Alice Gardner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juli 1619 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Sproughton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Gardner il 13 gennaio 1575, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 9 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Robert Cutler IIが1558年1月18日にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父Robert Cutler Iは34歳，母Parnell Barkerは28歳であった。1575年1月13日にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでAlice Gardnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1619年7月8日にイギリスイギリススフォルクスプロウトンで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Pancras, Chichester, West Sussex, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 치체스터 치체스터 스트 파크라스
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Cutler II(이)가 1558년 1월 18일 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Cutler I(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Parnell Barker(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1575년 1월 13일 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Alice Gardner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1619년 7월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스플루그h턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Cutler II nasceu em 18 de janeiro de 1558, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Cutler I, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Parnell Barker, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Gardner em 13 de janeiro de 1575, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de julho de 1619, em Sproughton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Pancras, Chichester, West Sussex, Eng: шичестир ст панкрас, шичестир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Cutler II родился 18 января 1558 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Cutler I было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Parnell Barker, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Gardner 13 января 1575 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 8 июля 1619 г. в местности спроугтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
